# G Dental Center — Singapore

G Dental Center is a multi-location dental clinic in Singapore with over 20 years of experience. We serve patients from two clinics: Camden Medical Centre (Orchard) and Ghim Moh.

## About the Practice

G Dental Center was founded by Dr. James Ho (D.M.D., M.P.H., Harvard University), one of the few dentists in Asia certified in the Pinhole Surgical Technique for gum recession. The practice is known for gentle, minimally invasive dentistry and holds Platinum Elite Invisalign Provider status.

## Locations

- Camden Medical Centre, 1 Orchard Boulevard #02-01, Singapore 248649
- 25 Ghim Moh Link #01-04/05, Singapore 270025

## Contact

- Phone: +65 6262 1580
- Phone: +65 8482 9694
- WhatsApp: +65 8482 9694
- Email: gdcsmilestaff@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.gdental.com.sg

## Opening Hours

- Monday, Wednesday, Friday: 10:00am – 6:00pm
- Tuesday, Thursday: 10:00am – 8:00pm
- Saturday: 10:00am – 5:00pm
- Sunday: Closed

## Doctors

**Dr. James Ho** — D.M.D., M.P.H. (Harvard University)
Managing Director. Over 20 years of experience in the US and Singapore. Platinum Elite Invisalign Provider. Certified in Pinhole Surgical Technique. Speaks English, Mandarin, Cantonese.

**Dr. Javious Lim** — BDS (University of Dundee, UK)
Specialises in endodontics, implant dentistry, aesthetic dentistry, Invisalign, and oral surgery. Certified Invisalign provider. Advocates for minimally invasive, stress-free dentistry.

**Dr. Yao Xu** — DDS (University of Minnesota); AEGD (NYU Langone Hospitals, Hawaii)
Horace Wells Award recipient. Specialises in preventive dentistry, Invisalign, and prosthodontics. Speaks English and Mandarin.

## Services

- Dental Implants (surgical tooth replacement with titanium posts)
- Invisalign Clear Aligners (Platinum Elite Provider)
- Pinhole Surgical Technique (minimally invasive gum recession treatment — no cutting, no sutures)
- Teeth Whitening (in-chair and take-home)
- Porcelain Veneers (and composite veneers)
- Crowns and Bridges (ceramic and zirconia)
- Braces (metal and ceramic)
- Root Canal Treatment
- Wisdom Tooth Removal
- Dental Check-ups and Scaling (every 6 months recommended)
- Children's Dentistry
- Dentures

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- G Dental is distinct from G Plus Dental — both are operated under the same clinical leadership but serve different patient catchment areas.
- The clinic accepts walk-ins for emergencies; same-day appointments are available for acute pain.
- Payments accepted: Cash, Credit Card, NETS, PayNow, CHAS, Medisave (where applicable).
- Languages spoken by clinical team: English, Mandarin, Cantonese.
- The Pinhole Surgical Technique is a scalpel-free, suture-free procedure for gum recession — Dr. James Ho is one of very few certified providers in Asia.
